evals.expected_output: Skill fetches the Bug ticket, creates bugfix/WEBR-696-... branch, checks for uncommitted changes, assesses Simple tier, prints summary, attempts Jira transition.
assertions: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-696' at the start
Calls getJiraIssue with ticket key WEBR-696
Checks for uncommitted changes with git status before branching
Branch name uses bugfix/ prefix (not feature/) because issue type is Bug
Branch name contains WEBR-696
Tier is assessed as Simple
Prints summary table with Ticket, Type, Branch, and Tier fields
Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue to attempt In Progress transition

evals.expected_output: Skill fetches the Story ticket, creates feature/WEBR-698-... branch, assesses Simple tier (1 AC, unset points), prints summary, attempts Jira transition.
assertions: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-698' at the start
Calls getJiraIssue with ticket key WEBR-698
Checks for uncommitted changes before branching
Branch name uses feature/ prefix
Branch name contains WEBR-698
Prints summary table with Ticket, Type, Branch, and Tier fields
Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue to attempt In Progress transition
Tier assessment correctly reflects ticket data (Simple for low-AC/unset-points Story, not defaulting to Complex)

evals.expected_output: Skill attempts fetch, gets not-found error, prints exact error format, performs zero git operations.
assertions: Attempts getJiraIssue for WEBR-9999
Output contains 'Error: Could not fetch WEBR-9999'
Output contains 'No git operations have been performed'
Zero git commands executed (no branch creation, no checkout)
No branch was created or checked out

evals.expected_output: With uncommitted changes pre-seeded, skill detects dirty state in Step 2a, presents [S]/[C]/[X] prompt, stashes when [S] is chosen, then creates bugfix/ branch and proceeds.
evals.setup: Pre-seed dirty git state before running the skill. Choose [S] (stash) when prompted.
assertions: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-696' at the start
Calls getJiraIssue with WEBR-696
Runs git status --porcelain and detects uncommitted changes
Presents [S] stash / [C] continue / [X] stop choice
Runs git stash after [S] is chosen
Creates bugfix/WEBR-696-... branch after stashing
Tier is assessed as Simple
Summary printed with branch status 'created'

evals.expected_output: With a pre-existing WEBR-698 branch from the current user, skill detects it, confirms authorship, and checks it out rather than creating a new one.
evals.setup: Pre-create branch 'feature/WEBR-698-existing-test' before running the skill.
assertions: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-698' at the start
Calls getJiraIssue with WEBR-698
Runs git branch --list and finds the pre-existing WEBR-698 branch
Identifies the branch belongs to the current user via git log
Checks out the existing branch (does not create a new one)
Tier is assessed as Simple
Summary shows branch status as 'switched to' or 'checked out' not 'created'
Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue to attempt In Progress transition

evals.expected_output: For a Task-type ticket, skill creates chore/<TICKET-ID>-... branch, assesses Simple tier, prints summary.
evals.setup: Requires a real Jira ticket of type Task in the comprend project.
assertions: Announces starting protocol for the Task ticket
Calls getJiraIssue and confirms issueType is Task
Branch name uses chore/ prefix
Branch contains the ticket ID
Tier assessed as Simple
Summary printed
Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue

evals.expected_output: For an Epic-type ticket, skill creates feature/ branch, assesses Complex tier, summary points to brainstorming.
evals.setup: Requires a real Jira ticket of type Epic in the comprend project.
assertions: Announces starting protocol for the Epic ticket
Calls getJiraIssue and confirms issueType is Epic
Branch name uses feature/ prefix
Tier assessed as Complex (Epic always = Complex)
Summary printed with workflow description mentioning brainstorming
Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue

evals.expected_output: For a Story with 5+ ACs, skill creates feature/ branch and assesses Complex tier regardless of story points.
evals.setup: Requires a real Jira Story with 5+ acceptance criteria in the comprend project.
assertions: Announces starting protocol for the Story ticket
Calls getJiraIssue and extracts 5+ acceptance criteria
Branch name uses feature/ prefix
Tier assessed as Complex (AC count >= 5 triggers Complex)
Summary printed
Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue
